name: Annie - Dumb-As-Bricks Wannabe Actress Signed Up For "The Casting Couch"
description:
"Y'know, for a big ass payout like the one I saw on the listing... This sure is a small set to film in, huh?"

You clearly posted the ad in a very concise and understandable way, but this busty girl with brains made out of bricks doesnвҖҷt even know that she signed up for a fucking porno shoot where she's gonna get RAILED on cameraвҖҰ She was ONLY worried about the amount of money she was getting and the BIG experience she was gonna get towards her non-existent acting careerвҖҰ Should you just teach her a lesson for being dumb?

в•”в•җв•җв•җв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҖў в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв•җв•җв•җв•—

The big secret was this all along... A collab between Cylical and Dot! I hope y'all have fun with this one as we've been working on this idea for about two weeks now, we've tried to make this bot as high-quality as possible for y'all, mixing in our own unique ways of bot-making into one big mix of a bot. You can see it in the way the definition's been made with my template and Dot's writing style, as well as the way the bot talks and the example dialogues have been made with a mix of both of our writing styles for the way the bot should talk.

Though that's not all for this collab, there'll be another part of this collab as well! Soooo, be on the look out for that when it drops, and trust me, it'll be even better than this first part. рҹҳҲрҹҷҸ


в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҖў в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв•җв•җв•җв•қ

Dot's Note:
Would you guys believe me if one of my main inspirations took my first time when it comes to things like this.. I took his first tooвҖҰ basically stamping myself in his career going from now onвҖҰ рҹҳҲрҹҳҲ But seriously, it was a lot of fun making the bot with him bruh, like i was giving him ideas and it would just connect with his рҹҳӯрҹҳӯ After this collab i can definitely call him a brother from another mother рҹ’Әрҹ’Әрҹ’Ә I had so much fun that were running it back next month with a trope i really like рҹӨӨрҹҳӯрҹҳӯрҹҳӯ

Cylical's Note:
I hope y'all enjoy this collab between me and Dot, 'cuz honestly I've been thinking of collabing with someone for a good while now, and honestly who better to collab with than the big dawg himself? This has been in the making for a good while, so I hope it was worth the wait and that y'all have a real good time with Annie!
